name: 系绳匕首（★） | 夜色
descriptionEn: This fixed-blade survival knife is designed to withstand being used as both a weapon and a tool, such as for setting traps, hunting animals or cutting foliage. The handle is wrapped in a length of multi-purpose paracord. It has been spray-painted with a tape mask pattern in a night ops color scheme. Spray... Pray... Paint... Stab.
descriptionZh: 这把拥有固定刀片的求生刀具为多功能用刀，即可充当武器也可用作工具。比如：可用来布置陷阱，狩猎野兽或砍断树枝。刀具握把用多功能伞绳裹住。 这把武器以黑夜配色的纸带图案进行了喷漆。 喷绘... 渲染... 上色... 刺杀。
